findings.finding: WSL Playwright Chromium cannot launch because libnspr4.so is missing; this audit used Windows Chrome headless CDP instead.
findings.impact: The product path was still exercised through a real browser protocol and captured screenshots, but Linux Playwright CI parity is not proven.
findings.disposition: Track for CI/tooling hardening; not a product blocker for this bounded stage audit.

findings.finding: Vite build emits a main chunk-size warning.
findings.impact: No functional failure observed. Bundle splitting/performance remains a later hardening task.
findings.disposition: Carry into Path D production governance/performance backlog.

findings.finding: PV22 reference app browser proof is contract/source-boundary plus SDK/Gateway API evidence, not a separately screenshotted external reference UI journey.
findings.impact: Sufficient for bounded contract review, insufficient for external developer experience launch claims.
findings.disposition: Require visual reference-app E2E before any external ecosystem or commercial readiness claim.
